raw:
{
  "judge_id": "J123",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 5,
    "R1.7": 5,
    "RX.1": 5,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 5
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent output provides a detailed critique of the related-work section, identifying several areas for improvement and providing specific suggestions for reorganization and rephrasing.",
    "R1.7": "The agent demonstrates excellent citation-level engagement, flagging missing or incorrect citations (e.g., HNSW) and suggesting more precise framing for existing citations (e.g., NSG).",
    "RX.1": "The agent output presents a clear and nuanced discussion of the limitations and uncertainties in the original text, including the need for more specific contribution claims and concrete numbers to support those claims.",
    "RX.3": "The agent's critique stays within the scope of the original text, focusing on the related-work section and providing targeted suggestions for improvement.",
    "RX.4": "The agent output does not introduce new errors or harmful content, instead providing a constructive and detailed critique of the original text.",
    "RX.5": "The agent provides clear and specific annotations for each suggested change, including explanations for why certain changes are necessary and how they will improve the overall quality of the text."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.9,
    "R1.7": 0.95,
    "RX.1": 0.85,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.95,
    "RX.5": 0.9
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent output provides a detailed critique of the related-work section, identifying several areas for improvement and providing specific suggestions for reorganization and rephrasing.
rationale.R1.7: The agent demonstrates excellent citation-level engagement, flagging missing or incorrect citations (e.g., HNSW) and suggesting more precise framing for existing citations (e.g., NSG).
rationale.RX.1: The agent output presents a clear and nuanced discussion of the limitations and uncertainties in the original text, including the need for more specific contribution claims and concrete numbers to support those claims.
rationale.RX.3: The agent's critique stays within the scope of the original text, focusing on the related-work section and providing targeted suggestions for improvement.
rationale.RX.4: The agent output does not introduce new errors or harmful content, instead providing a constructive and detailed critique of the original text.
rationale.RX.5: The agent provides clear and specific annotations for each suggested change, including explanations for why certain changes are necessary and how they will improve the overall quality of the text.
